codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly adds a transparent, click-through Electron window as a ghost cursor. It listens to Midscene's dump updates, defensively parses the target coordinates from the execution dump tasks, and seamlessly repositions the window to indicate the intended interaction point while the agent is running.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker spent time reverse-engineering the Midscene executionDump structure by reading node_modules type definitions. The structure for extracting target coordinates should be documented in library/midscene.md to avoid this overhead in future tasks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker grepping for 'event|plan|target|coor' in frontend/node_modules/@midscene/core/**/*.d.ts and reading types.d.ts to figure out how to extract target coordinates.

summary: The ghost cursor feature was implemented robustly using Electron BrowserWindow and Midscene task parsing. The code is safe against undefined properties. Review passed without issues.
